title: An Act relative to discrimination against cash buyers

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Garry of Dracut, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Colleen M. Garry for legislation to require that all establishments be required to accept cash for transactions.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
